titles.title: VowSpace: A vowel formant analysis application for phonetic research

institution.institution_name: Hacettepe University, Department of English Linguistics, Ankara, Türkiye

citation.article_title: A comparison of vowel normalization procedures for language variation research

citation.journal_title: The Journal of the Acoustical Society of America

citation.unstructured_citation: Boersma, P., & Weenink, D. (2025). Praat: Doing phonetics by computer (Version 6.4.39). https://praat.org/
